name: Desktop Bridge
description: Connects OpenEnsemble agents to the user's local desktop app for sandboxed local files, downloads, generated assets, and optional local shell command execution.
intent_examples: save this generated image to my computer
write that file into my local documents sandbox
download this video into my desktop downloads folder
systemPromptAddition:
## Desktop Bridge

The desktop_* file tools access sandbox folders configured in the OpenEnsemble Desktop app. Use desktop_list_clients if you need to confirm a desktop client is connected, and desktop_list_sandboxes if you need the available sandbox names. Do not use desktop_run_command unless {{USER_NAME}} explicitly asks to run a local shell command. desktop_run_command runs as the desktop user's normal OS account with cwd set inside a sandbox; it is not a filesystem jail, network sandbox, container, or privilege boundary. Command execution may be disabled in the desktop app.

function.name: desktop_list_clients
function.description: List connected OpenEnsemble Desktop app clients for this user.

function.name: desktop_list_sandboxes
function.description: List local sandbox folders configured in the connected desktop app.

function.name: desktop_list_files
function.description: List files inside a named local sandbox.

sandbox.description: Sandbox name, such as documents, downloads, images, videos, research, or coder.

path.description: Path inside the sandbox. Defaults to .

function.name: desktop_read_file
function.description: Read a UTF-8 text file from a named local sandbox.

maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes to read. Default 1 MB.

function.name: desktop_write_file
function.description: Write a UTF-8 text file inside a named local sandbox.

function.name: desktop_save_file
function.description: Save generated text or base64 file content inside a named local sandbox and return its local path.

function.name: desktop_download_url
function.description: Download an http/https URL into a local sandbox folder, with a desktop-enforced size cap.

maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes to download. Desktop default is 100 MB; desktop hard cap is 1 GB.

function.name: desktop_run_command
function.description: Run a shell command as the desktop user with cwd set inside a local sandbox. This is not a filesystem or network jail. The desktop app must have command execution enabled.
